## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX and Homebase to discuss SEO strategy, reporting, and content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Reporting focus: Shift to SEO-specific metrics before expanding to full-funnel data](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Content direction: Moving towards more diverse, high-value content (glossaries, calculators) vs. AI-generated blogs](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Action items: GrowthX to propose opportunities for unique value-add and provide updated content plan](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

## Topics

### SEO Reporting and Data Analysis

  - [Discussed ICP filtering and reporting capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Current challenge: Data silos between platforms (e.g., Salesforce not connected)](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Goal: Better understand quality of traffic and performance](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Action: GrowthX to provide SEO-specific reports, including metrics like total impressions, clicks, and % of traffic](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving away from high-volume, AI-generated blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Focus on:](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
    1.  Fact-based content (e.g., glossaries)
    2.  Interactive tools (e.g., calculators)
    3.  "Multi-dimensional" content beyond standard blogs
  - [Aim: Fewer, higher-value pieces with better ROI](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Glossary Project

  - [Priority for upcoming work](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Plan: Review competitor glossaries, prioritize terms](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Caution: Avoid including terms better suited for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Calculator/Interactive Tools

  - [Interest in enhancing existing tools (e.g., hourly salary calculator)](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Clarification: GrowthX can provide content/data, but implementation requires Homebase engineering](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Example: Potential to create content for multiple calculators (e.g., 20+ on a single page)](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

### Content Production and Metrics

  - [Need to establish cost-per-metric benchmarks (e.g., cost per keyword, cost per traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Current assessment: Not achieving desired bang for buck in terms of traffic and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Action: GrowthX to provide cost breakdowns and traffic projections for proposed content](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare proposal on unique value-add opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Update content plan with focus on glossary and calculator pages](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Provide high-level view of current performance, including breakdowns by programmatic approach](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Compile updates for next weekly meeting](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Share updated reports via Slack when ready](https://fathom.video/share/DQ3kdcJiDawXK2w4SfnvitvqtnZWSN7L?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
